judge_result.short_rationale: Includes fresh air, but omits the required action to call 911/ambulance if not breathing and omits calling poison control or a doctor for treatment advice. It also adds unsupported cross-incident advice (wash exposed skin/face, do not induce vomiting, do not give drinks), which is dangerous and not grounded for this inhalation scenario.
